x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for HAM is the foundational plugin enabling all AI capabilities for hardware asset lifecycle management including refresh recommendations and disposal insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware asset lifecycle recommendations, refresh planning, and disposal insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware lifecycle management and refresh planning are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is not active. All AI-powered hardware asset management capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccc
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for HAM is the foundational plugin enabling all AI capabilities for hardware asset lifecycle management including refresh recommendations and disposal insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware asset lifecycle recommendations, refresh planning, and disposal insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware lifecycle management and refresh planning are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is not active. All AI-powered hardware asset management capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HAM</module> <number>CHK0006233</number> <order>100</order> <remediation_guidance>Activate Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccc</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
